EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} created security group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} could not remove a security group on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} could not create security group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} removed a security group on host {event_src.host}
